clientInit.explanation: Admin is an interface with static create() factory methods and no public constructors, following the standard Kafka client pattern where the static factory methods return an implementation instance (typically KafkaAdminClient) while keeping the implementation details hidden from users.

methods.name: createTopics
methods.description: Creates new topics in the Kafka cluster with specified configurations and options.

methods.name: deleteTopics
methods.description: Deletes specified topics from the Kafka cluster permanently.

methods.name: listTopics
methods.description: Lists all available topics in the Kafka cluster with optional filtering.

methods.name: describeTopics
methods.description: Retrieves detailed information about specified topics including partitions, replicas, and configurations.

methods.name: describeCluster
methods.description: Retrieves information about the Kafka cluster including broker details and controller information.

methods.name: describeAcls
methods.description: Retrieves access control lists (ACLs) that match the specified filter criteria.

methods.name: createAcls
methods.description: Creates new access control lists (ACLs) to manage permissions for Kafka resources.

methods.name: deleteAcls
methods.description: Deletes access control lists (ACLs) that match the specified filter patterns.

methods.name: describeConfigs
methods.description: Retrieves configuration settings for specified Kafka resources like topics or brokers.

methods.name: alterConfigs
methods.description: Modifies configuration settings for specified Kafka resources by replacing entire configurations.

methods.name: incrementalAlterConfigs
methods.description: Modifies configuration settings for specified Kafka resources by applying incremental changes.

methods.name: describeLogDirs
methods.description: Retrieves information about log directories on specified brokers including size and partition details.

methods.name: createPartitions
methods.description: Increases the number of partitions for specified topics.

methods.name: deleteRecords
methods.description: Deletes records from specified topic partitions before a given offset.

methods.name: describeConsumerGroups
methods.description: Retrieves detailed information about specified consumer groups including members and their assignments.

methods.name: listConsumerGroups
methods.description: Lists all consumer groups in the Kafka cluster.

methods.name: listConsumerGroupOffsets
methods.description: Retrieves the committed offsets for specified consumer groups and topic partitions.

methods.name: deleteConsumerGroups
methods.description: Deletes specified consumer groups from the Kafka cluster.

methods.name: deleteConsumerGroupOffsets
methods.description: Deletes committed offsets for specific topic partitions within a consumer group.

methods.name: alterConsumerGroupOffsets
methods.description: Modifies the committed offsets for specific topic partitions within a consumer group.

methods.name: listOffsets
methods.description: Retrieves the earliest or latest offsets for specified topic partitions based on timestamp.

methods.name: describeClientQuotas
methods.description: Retrieves quota configurations for clients matching the specified filter.

methods.name: alterClientQuotas
methods.description: Modifies quota configurations for specified clients to control resource usage.

methods.name: describeUserScramCredentials
methods.description: Retrieves SCRAM authentication credentials information for specified users.

methods.name: alterUserScramCredentials
methods.description: Modifies SCRAM authentication credentials for specified users.

methods.name: describeFeatures
methods.description: Retrieves information about supported and finalized features in the Kafka cluster.

methods.name: updateFeatures
methods.description: Updates the feature levels for specified features in the Kafka cluster.

methods.name: describeProducers
methods.description: Retrieves information about active producers for specified topic partitions.

methods.name: describeTransactions
methods.description: Retrieves detailed information about specified transactions including their state and metadata.

methods.name: abortTransaction
methods.description: Forcefully aborts a hanging transaction on a specific topic partition.

methods.name: listTransactions
methods.description: Lists all active transactions in the Kafka cluster with optional filtering.

methods.name: electLeaders
methods.description: Triggers preferred or unclean leader election for specified topic partitions.

methods.name: alterPartitionReassignments
methods.description: Modifies the replica assignment for specified topic partitions to rebalance data.

methods.name: listPartitionReassignments
methods.description: Retrieves information about ongoing partition reassignments for specified topics.

methods.name: removeMembersFromConsumerGroup
methods.description: Removes specified members from a consumer group to force rebalancing.
